original_image_tags: Handwritten letter on aged paper with two hole-punch marks at the top. Text is written in cursive blue ink. A red "RECORDED" stamp is visible in the lower right quadrant, over the text. Below the stamp, a faint red date stamp reads "FEB 29 1950". A small pencil annotation "205" is visible near the bottom right. The bottom left corner has a small pencil annotation "ak 2/24/50".

elements.description: A faint circular stamp containing illegible text and a date 'FEB 24 1950' is visible over the bottom right portion of the handwritten text.

judge.reason: Description A quotes a specific stamp date 'FEB 29 1950' and a red 'RECORDED' stamp, while Description B quotes a completely different stamp date 'FEB 24 1950' and describes the stamp as faint and circular with illegible text, indicating a direct contradiction on the content of the same visual element.
